texto: I probably don't make as much money as people think I make. I make more than the usual medium household. I'm one of the few middle class actors out there. The microcosm of Hollywood reflects the macrocosm of international finance.
explicacao: Citação de James Ransone sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “I probably don't make as much money as people think I make. I make more than the usual medium hou…” articula reflexao, money, people em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como people e think.
